[PUBLISHED DATE]: Oct. 7, 2020
[TITLE]: Photo: Marine Stands Guard Outside of Oval Office - WAP20201007310 - UPI.com
[METADATA/INTRO]: A Marine wearing a protective face mask is seen on duty outside of the West Wing where it has been reported that U.S President Donald Trump is being briefed on the status of coronavirus stimulus negotiations in the Oval Office...
